execution_steps: Run 'loom start <task_id>' to lock active context
Check git status to ensure workspace awareness
specific details based on context: e.g., Modify JSON artifacts in .spec/data/ for components X and Y
Run 'loom sync' to update Graph DB
Run 'loom validate' to check for orphans
Ensure all design constraints and rules are satisfied BEFORE calling loom_complete.
Make a git commit with the implemented changes
definition_of_done: No broken links or orphans introduced
[[REPLACE_WITH_SPECIFIC_CRITERIA]]: e.g., The new design resolves constraints for FR-X
loom validate passes (Checks Traces/Metadata only, DOES NOT run code tests)
